description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, elongated layout and a prominent wraparound porch. The exterior is clad in light blue siding with white trim, and the structure features multiple gabled roofs, including a central cross-gable section. Large windows are distributed along the facades, providing ample natural light, while the porch is accessible via a set of stairs and bordered by a white railing. The building sits on a raised foundation with a wooden deck extending from the main entrance area. The roof is finished in dark gray shingles, and the property is surrounded by a neatly maintained green lawn. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern ranch-style bungalow with inviting outdoor living spaces.
description: A spacious, single-story blue bungalow with a wraparound porch, multiple gabled roofs, and large windows, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, wraparound porch, and central gabled roof with white railings and steps leading up.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the elongated structure, the depth of the porch, and the extended roofline along the length of the building.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the cross-gabled section, additional porch area, and a secondary entrance with steps.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the extended deck, side windows, and the continuation of the porch around the building.
